source.cookbook: Black Rican Vegan   Fire Plant Based Recipes from
source.author: Various

ingredients.item:
COMPRA LIST
2 frozen Beyond Meat patties
6 tbsp (90 ml) olive oil, divided
1 tbsp (9 g) Adobo
2 tbsp (8 g) fresh oregano, divided
1 large yellow onion, sliced
1 large red onion, sliced
2 tbsp (30 ml) Sofrito
3 cloves garlic, minced
1 vegan vegetable bouillon cube
½ cup (120 ml) vegetable stock
½ (8-oz [225-g]) can tomato sauce
1 tbsp (15 ml) red wine vinegar
2 bay leaves
ingredients.original:
COMPRA LIST
2 frozen Beyond Meat patties
6 tbsp (90 ml) olive oil, divided
1 tbsp (9 g) Adobo
2 tbsp (8 g) fresh oregano, divided
1 large yellow onion, sliced
1 large red onion, sliced
2 tbsp (30 ml) Sofrito
3 cloves garlic, minced
1 vegan vegetable bouillon cube
½ cup (120 ml) vegetable stock
½ (8-oz [225-g]) can tomato sauce
1 tbsp (15 ml) red wine vinegar
2 bay leaves

ingredients.item: Season the frozen patties with 2 tablespoons (30 ml) of the olive oil, the adobo and 1 tablespoon (4 g) of the oregano. Marinate the patties in the refrigerator in plastic wrap or a ziplock bag until they thaw. Once the patties are thawed, you can shape each into a rectangle to look like cubed steak.
ingredients.original: Season the frozen patties with 2 tablespoons (30 ml) of the olive oil, the adobo and 1 tablespoon (4 g) of the oregano. Marinate the patties in the refrigerator in plastic wrap or a ziplock bag until they thaw. Once the patties are thawed, you can shape each into a rectangle to look like cubed steak.

ingredients.item: In a large pan over medium heat, heat 2 tablespoons (30 ml) of the olive oil and add the yellow and red onions. Cook until the onions soften a bit.
ingredients.original: In a large pan over medium heat, heat 2 tablespoons (30 ml) of the olive oil and add the yellow and red onions. Cook until the onions soften a bit.

ingredients.item: Transfer the onions to a bowl and set aside. Add the remaining 2 tablespoons (30 ml) of olive oil to the pan, plus the sofrito, garlic and vegetable bouillon cube, breaking down the cube. Add both patties and cook them on both sides for 4 minutes.
ingredients.original: Transfer the onions to a bowl and set aside. Add the remaining 2 tablespoons (30 ml) of olive oil to the pan, plus the sofrito, garlic and vegetable bouillon cube, breaking down the cube. Add both patties and cook them on both sides for 4 minutes.
